encounter_context: 68-year-old man with COPD and insulin-dependent diabetes admitted for worsening dyspnea.
ED evaluation focused on home oxygen dependence and missed insulin doses during the last 24 hours.
active_problems: Acute on chronic hypoxemic respiratory failure
Hyperglycemia after missed q8h insulin doses
recent_changes: Required 4 L oxygen in the ED instead of baseline 2 L.
Last scheduled q8h insulin dose was missed before arrival.
medications: Insulin q8h at home; restart immediately on admission.
safety_critical_facts: If q8h insulin is omitted, glucose rises rapidly and patient becomes clinically unstable.
Oxygen requirement above baseline must be monitored closely.
supporting_source_excerpts: Nursing note: patient missed the afternoon q8h insulin dose before arrival.
Respiratory therapy note: now requiring 4 L oxygen, baseline is 2 L at home.
